== Notes for [[Item:Q91249|Q91249]] ==

Anton di Roma claimed his descent from Hercules.

--------------------

Claimed descent from Hercules

--------------------

Claimed descent from Hercules

--------------------

Claimed descent from Hercules

--------------------

Claimed descent from Hercules

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per05659.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
Claimed descent from Hercules

Claimed descent from Hercules

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
